Package org.bukkit.block.structure

package org.bukkit.block.structure
Classes relevant to structure blocks.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.bukkit.block
    Classes used to manipulate the voxels in a world, including special states.
    org.bukkit.block.banner
    Classes relevant to banner blocks.
    org.bukkit.block.data
    Generalized BlockData classes.
    org.bukkit.block.sign
    Classes relevant to signs.
    org.bukkit.block.spawner
    Classes relevant to mob spawners.
  • Enum Classes
    Class
    Description
    Mirror
    Represents how a Structure can be mirrored upon being loaded.
    StructureRotation
    Represents how a Structure can be rotated.
    UsageMode
    Represents how a Structure can be used.
